title: Moderation Update — April 29, 2026
body: We've completed a triage of the abuse queue. Two accounts were banned for high-severity spam (phishing links) and targeted harassment of newcomers. One account received a warning for suspicious automated behavior. Two reports involving trusted community members were reviewed and closed as a moderation dispute and a coordinated false-flag campaign, respectively. One low-severity formatting report was closed with no action. Thank you for keeping our community safe — please continue reporting issues.
